summary: Iteration 5 testing complete. Verified new features: GET /api/stats/players aggregation endpoint, History page Top Players section + filter, FinalLeaderboard Download Share Card (PNG generation + download + toast). All passing.
passed: GET /api/stats/players?limit=12 returns 200 with players array; 4 aggregated records observed with fields {name, games_played, wins, total_score, best_score, avg_score, win_rate} sorted by wins desc
/history page renders top-players section with 4 top-player-N cards showing rank, name, wins (e.g. '1W'), games_played, avg, best
history-filter input filters by player name 'Host' -> 1 matching item
history-filter input filters by room code (e.g. '0AS41') -> 1 matching item
history-filter with no match shows history-empty
Clearing filter restores full list (2 items)
FinalLeaderboard renders with download-card-btn (text 'Download Share Card')
Clicking download-card-btn triggers download with filename matching 'quiz-{CODE}-results.png' (verified quiz-ULO2W-results.png, 145884 bytes)
Toast 'Card downloaded! Share it 📲' appears after download
No console errors during share card generation
Regression: create room, join, settings, start, answer, finish flow still works; Hall of Fame route loads; FinalLeaderboard podium + Play Again + Leave buttons intact
notes: Backend settings endpoint returned 400 for {rounds_count:1, round_duration_s:5} with 2 players — likely validation on minimum rounds; not part of this iteration's scope and did not block the test (game completed using defaults via round_result state). Share card PNG size 145KB confirms canvas content was drawn including winner banner + rankings.
